web.feedback.all_feedback_welcome.text: E whakaaetia ana ngā urupare katoa!

web.feedback.help_us_improve.text: Āwhinatia mātou ki te whakapai ake

web.feedback.help_content_goes_here.text: Ka haere ngā ihirangi āwhina ki konei.

web.feedback.founder_note_line1.text: Ka pānui au i ngā urupare katoa e tae mai ana ki konei. Ko te tikanga tēnei e mōhio ai au me whakapau kaha ki hea.

web.feedback.founder_note_line2.text: Mēnā he mea kāore e tika, he whakaaro rānei tāu mō te āhua o te mahi, ko tēnei te wāhi tika.

web.feedback.reason_email_change_unautho.text: It looks like you're reporting an unauthorized email change on your account. Please describe what happened and we'll investigate right away.
